Package neqsim.process.safety.scenario

Class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.scenario.ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
public static class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch extends Object implements Serializable
Consequence branch for ignition and no-ignition outcomes.

  • Constructor Details

    • ConsequenceBranch

      public ConsequenceBranch(String branchId, String consequenceType, double conditionalProbability, String ignitionTiming, String description)
      Creates a consequence branch.
      Parameters:
      branchId - stable branch id
      consequenceType - consequence type, for example Jet fire or VCE
      conditionalProbability - branch probability conditional on the release, from 0 to 1
      ignitionTiming - ignition timing, for example immediate, delayed or none
      description - branch description

  • Method Details

    • getBranchId

      public String getBranchId()
      Gets branch id.
      Returns:
      branch id

      Gets ignition timing.
      Returns:

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the branch to a JSON-friendly map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation
